mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.standard_name, s.org_id, s.dept_id, s.position_id, s.grade_level, s.base_salary, s.performance_salary, s.position_allowance, s.meal_allowance, s.transport_allowance, s.communication_allowance, s.housing_allowance, s.other_allowance, s.status, s.industry_type, s.ext_json, s.remark, s.created_time, s.updated_time, o.name as orgName, d.name as deptName, p.name as positionName FROM hr_payroll_standard s LEFT JOIN hr_organization o ON s.org_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hr_department d ON s.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN hr_position p ON s.position_id = p.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted = 0

SELECT s.id, s.standard_name, s.org_id, s.dept_id, s.position_id, s.grade_level, s.base_salary, s.performance_salary, s.position_allowance, s.meal_allowance, s.transport_allowance, s.communication_allowance, s.housing_allowance, s.other_allowance, s.status, s.industry_type, s.ext_json, s.remark, s.created_time, s.updated_time, o.name as orgName, d.name as deptName, p.name as positionName FROM hr_payroll_standard s LEFT JOIN hr_organization o ON s.org_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hr_department d ON s.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN hr_position p ON s.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN hr_employee e ON ( (s.org_id IS NULL OR e.org_id = s.org_id) AND (s.dept_id IS NULL OR e.dept_id = s.dept_id) AND (s.position_id IS NULL OR e.position_id = s.position_id) AND (s.grade_level IS NULL OR e.grade_level = s.grade_level) ) WHERE e.id = #{employeeId} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE' AND s.deleted = 0 AND e.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.position_id IS NOT NULL DESC, s.dept_id IS NOT NULL DESC, s.org_id IS NOT NULL DESC LIMIT 1
